mechanism: Fiscal credibility concerns drive the long-end of the yield curve to exhibit positive correlation with equities (compounding losses) while the short-end maintains negative correlation (hedging function), expressing the market's differentiated trust in cyclical vs fiscal management.
regime_dependence: Holds when fiscal trajectory is perceived as unsustainable at the long end. Would collapse if fiscal consolidation restored long-end credibility. Front-end relationship depends on continued Fed cyclical credibility.
